name: Denkyosha Co.,Ltd.
summary: Denkyosha Co.,Ltd. engages in the wholesale business in Japan. The company offers ceramic fan heaters, electric stoves, kotatsu units, casual kotatsu, electric kotatsu, electric fans, circulators, microwave ovens, oven toasters, electric shavers, LED desk stands, cleaners, CD radios and cassettes, disaster prevention lights, IH rice cookers, electric pots, electric kettles, food processors, handy blenders, hot plates, home bakery, juice mixers, slow juicers, vacuum packers, coffee makers, espresso makers, oven toasters, liquor cookers, cleaners, robot cleaners, electric sewing machines, household rice mills, refrigerators, freezers, ventilation fans, wine cellars, cleaner tip parts, stainless steel bottles, and bath pumps. It also provides audio communication equipment, including Blu-ray and DVD discs, CD-R discs, audio tapes, radio and DVD radio cassette players, mini component systems, Bluetooth speakers, headphones, TV door phones, interphones, OA equipment, home broadcasting antenna, security cameras, smartphone accessories, memory cards, USB memory, printer papers, PC peripherals, and drive recorders; and seasonal products, such as tower fans, air conditioners, dehumidifiers, circulators, air conditioner accessories, panel heaters, oil stoves, oil fan heaters, oil heaters, gas fan heaters, carbon heaters, humidifiers, and anchors. In addition, the company offers health cosmetology equipment; and wiring and lighting equipment, dry batteries, battery application products, sensor lights, LED lights, security auxiliary locks, fire extinguishers, earthquake-resistant mats, disaster prevention products, shower toilets, water supply products, shower heads, gas tables, gas water heaters, gas rice cookers, casting stoves, range stands, safes, clocks, carbonated water makers, food waste disposers, washing machines, PC glasses, and insect traps. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
